trivia_bullets.text: Battle for Zendikar (BFZ, released 2015-10-02) stages the Eldrazi titan Ulamog's invasion of Zendikar. The Kor are depicted as a key resistance race — nomadic cliff-dwelling warriors who have adapted their hook-and-rope toolkit into anti-Eldrazi combat doctrine. The BFZ Kor Ally cluster represents the Kor's decision to fight collectively despite their traditionally individualistic nomadism. [Scryfall API; coolstuffinc.com: Ecology of the Kor via WebSearch]
sources: coolstuffinc.com: Ecology of the Kor (WebSearch snippet)

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: "We came into this world together. We fight for this world together. We'll leave this world together." [Scryfall] This is a direct statement of collective commitment — notable in Kor lore given their traditionally nomadic, scattered culture. The flavor text's "leave this world together" reads as a vow that accepts death as a possible collective outcome, giving the card a gravity unusual for a white uncommon.

Rally — whenever this creature or another Ally enters, tap target creature an opponent controls. At {4}{W} for a 3/4, Kor Entanglers' Rally trigger is a pseudo-Maze of Ith effect that triggers off every Ally entering — in a rally chain, each Ally entering can tap down a different blocker. EDHREC rank 17,836 reflects its status as a draft-role uncommon not crossing to Commander staple territory. [Scryfall]

Illustrated by Jason Rainville, who has painted numerous Ally-creature cards across BFZ and Oath of the Gatewatch, giving him a strong visual claim on the BFZ Ally aesthetic. The hooked-rope visual language across both Kor Bladewhirl (Belledin) and Kor Entanglers (Rainville) reinforces the race's design identity despite being by different artists. [Scryfall]

related_cards.name: Kor Bladewhirl
related_cards.note: Sister Kor Ally card in the same set — same race, same Rally keyword, same collector range (34 vs 36)

related_cards.name: Lantern Scout
related_cards.note: Kor Scout Ally in the same BFZ cycle with a different Rally payoff (lifelink)

related_cards.name: Kazandu Blademaster
related_cards.note: Kor Ally lord from the original Zendikar block — precursor design to the BFZ Ally cluster

related_cards.name: Drana's Emissary
related_cards.note: Cross-faction Ally card from BFZ; Kor Entanglers' tap-down Rally synergizes with drain-damage builds
